summary: Comprehensive testing of Discipline OS MVP completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features tested and working. Full integration between backend and frontend verified.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow instead) - not critical, just deprecation warnings
Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' - not critical

action_items: Optional: Update shadow props to use boxShadow to remove deprecation warnings
Optional: Update pointerEvents usage to remove deprecation warnings
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend: All endpoints working correctly with proper error handling
✅ Backend: MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses
✅ Frontend: All interactive elements have testID attributes
✅ Frontend: Proper React Native components used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ Frontend: Loading states and error handling implemented
✅ Integration: Backend and frontend fully integrated and working
✅ Design: Mobile-first design with proper touch targets (44px+)
✅ Design: Monochrome with red accent color scheme implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend testing with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP features tested and working. Backend API fully functional. Frontend UI working correctly with proper integration. Only minor deprecation warnings in console (not affecting functionality). RevenueCat subscription is MOCKED using AsyncStorage.

frontend_flows: ✅ User registration flow - create account with name, email, password
✅ User login flow - sign in with email/password
✅ Home dashboard loads with quote, progress cards, quick actions
✅ Create a goal via the Goals tab or quick add button
✅ Goal detail page - add milestones, toggle milestone completion
✅ Create a daily task via the Tasks tab
✅ Create a reminder via the Reminders tab
✅ Profile page - shows stats, user info, subscription status
✅ Tab navigation works between Home, Goals, Tasks, Profile

mocked_apis.description: RevenueCat subscription is MOCKED using AsyncStorage
mocked_apis.details: Subscription state stored locally in AsyncStorage. No real payment processing. Purchase flow simulates successful purchase and updates local state.
